name: Relative Valuation
steps: Compare target PE to peer average
Assign rating based on relative value

name: Triple Catalyst Analysis
steps: Assess capital expansion in supply chain
Evaluate end-user demand growth (e.g., AI data centers)

name: 相对估值法
steps: 对比历史分位数或行业均值

name: Relative Performance Rating
steps: Compare stock performance against benchmark index (CSI 300)
Assess relative upside potential over 6 months
Assign rating based on expected outperformance threshold (>20% for Buy)

name: Financial Projection Modeling
steps: Project future revenue and profit based on growth assumptions

name: Fundamental Analysis with Rating
steps: Assess current business leadership and product technology
Evaluate growth in new business lines (IoT, Sensors, MLED, Medical)
Analyze strategic partnerships and R&D investments
Assign rating based on expected relative performance against benchmark

name: Cross-Generational Health Demand Analysis
steps: Measure health anxiety and focus areas

name: Ethnic Subgroup Efficacy Validation
steps: Extract subgroup data from clinical trials
Assess statistical significance of interaction p-values

name: Competitive Pipeline Mapping
steps: Categorize by development stage (Phase I, II, III, NDA)

name: Weekly Market Monitoring Report
steps: Collect weekly transaction data from CRIC for 30 key cities.
Calculate city-tier indices and aggregate volumes.
Compile policy updates from national and local sources.
Present data in tables and charts with week-over-week and year-over-year comparisons.

failure_modes: 驱动因素增长不及预期
name: 产业链受益逻辑分析
steps: 分析成本构成与需求环节

name: 产业链价格跟踪与展望
steps: 收集各环节现货/期货价格

failure_modes: 政策执行力度不及预期
外部环境突变抵消政策效果
name: 政策影响传导分析
steps: 梳理关键政策出台时间线
分析政策对市场信心、业务开展、资本补充等具体环节的影响
评估政策对行业长期发展的基础性作用

failure_modes: 风险传染效应未被识别
name: 信用风险事件跟踪与评估
steps: 监测监管处罚、信用级别调整等事件
分析事件性质、频率及对主体信用的潜在影响
判断是否构成系统性或重大个体风险

name: 资本与融资活动分析
steps: 跟踪IPO、再融资、并购重组等资本运作进展
分析市场环境与监管政策对资本补充节奏的影响
评估资本充足性对业务扩张和风险抵御能力的影响

name: Weekly Sector Performance Analysis
steps: Collect weekly price data for sector constituents
Aggregate to sector return (e.g., equal or market-cap weighted)

name: Drug Pipeline Competitive Analysis
steps: Define target drug class and indications
Gather pipeline data from databases or reports
Categorize drugs by development stage and company
Map competitive landscape and identify leaders
Track historical sales for approved benchmark drugs

name: Competitive Benchmarking Analysis
steps: Identify key competitor product (e.g., Tesla Model 3, Model Y)
Gather performance metrics for subject product (e.g., Xiaomi SU7 delivery volume)
Assess relative competitive position and momentum

name: New Product Launch Impact Forecasting
steps: Analyze predecessor product performance and market reception
Assess target market size and competitive landscape
Project initial sales volume and market share capture

name: 国际经济形势对比分析
steps: 收集主要经济体宏观数据

name: 金融稳定风险评估
required_current_data: 金融稳定保障基金进展
steps: 总结金融系统工作成效

failure_modes: 下游需求恢复不及预期
渠道库存消化慢于预期
name: 盈利预测与估值
steps: 分析历史财务数据（营收、利润、费用率等）
评估短期经营压力（渠道库存、需求）
判断长期市场空间（渗透率、技术壁垒）
预测未来三年财务数据（收入、利润）

name: 财务预测建模
steps: 建立收入与利润预测模型

name: 行业趋势与竞争格局分析
steps: 识别行业关键驱动因素
评估竞争格局与主要玩家
判断行业生命周期阶段

name: 政策影响分析
steps: 评估政策对行业/公司的潜在影响
判断政策执行力度与持续性

name: 事件驱动分析
steps: 识别重大公司事件（如收购）
评估事件对业务板块（如中药）的战略影响
分析协同效应（如销售能力、研发能力）

name: 分部业务增长分析
steps: 识别关键增长业务分部（如CSO）
量化分部收入及增长率
分析增长驱动因素（如新品种引入）
评估对整体业绩的贡献

failure_modes: 未考虑宏观或行业风险
name: 盈利预测模型
required_current_data: 公司年度初步核算数据
steps: 收集公司初步核算数据
结合历史季度数据推算
预测未来年度收入与利润

name: Project-based revenue forecasting
steps: Identify new project wins from announcements
Extract project lifecycle and estimated revenue

name: Financial projection and valuation
steps: Forecast income statement items (revenue, costs, profit)

failure_modes: 技术问题导致产量不达标
name: 产能释放跟踪
Peer Comparison Analysis
steps: Identify comparable companies based on business similarity
Collect key financial metrics for peers
Calculate averages and compare to subject company

name: Market Sizing and Forecasting
steps: Project future market size using growth rates

name: Dual-Track R&D Architecture
steps: Identify clinical business needs for rapid customization
Deploy low-code/no-code platforms (JianDaoYun, FineReport) for simple apps
Deploy via Kubernetes private cloud with containerization and GitOps pipeline

name: Dual-Wheel Drive Organizational Model
steps: Establish Information Center for infrastructure, security, and basic software
Establish Data Center for data governance, AI, and research data
Implement personnel flow and resource sharing between centers
Align with national data element policies

failure_modes: Algorithm estimation bias in sales/search volume
name: 30-Day Rolling Window Analysis
steps: Define 'Current Month' as 30 days prior to report date (2026-04-23)
Define 'Previous Month' as 30 days prior to the start of 'Current Month'
Calculate metrics based on data within these windows

name: Store Performance Segmentation
steps: Identify stores with increasing vs. decreasing sales/volume/price
Calculate percentage distribution of these segments
Analyze amplitude of change for each segment

name: Sector Relative Performance Analysis
steps: Compare sector index vs broad market

name: 周度行业观察框架
steps: 回顾上周板块相对表现及排名
跟踪宏观/行业高频数据（运价、租金等）
梳理重点公司季度财报数据
结合宏观政策（如十五五规划）给出投资建议

failure_modes: Confounding variables (e.g., marketing campaigns), data lag
name: Infrastructure-Tourism Correlation Analysis
steps: Measure tourist arrivals in affected regions before and after investment
Calculate growth rates and attribute causality where data supports

name: Post-Pandemic Recovery Tracking
steps: Track annual arrivals and revenue against baseline
Identify recovery milestones and new growth drivers

name: 排除法细分分析
steps: 排除特定大型公司(如三大运营商及中兴通讯)
重新计算剩余公司指标

failure_modes: 历史数据窗口选择偏差
name: 估值分位数分析
steps: 计算当前值在历史数据中的分位数

name: 结构性机会识别
steps: 分析资本开支变化趋势
识别基础设施投资方向(如算力网络)

name: 行业趋势研判
steps: 收集历史市场规模数据

failure_modes: Definition changes in 'crude steel' over time
name: Historical Production Trend Analysis
steps: Collect annual production data from 1950 to 2025
Calculate Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) for 5-year periods
Identify shifts in growth trajectory (e.g., negative growth in 2020-2025)

failure_modes: Inconsistent data collection standards across members
name: Sustainability Indicator Aggregation
steps: Collect 19 core sustainability indicators from member companies
Normalize data per ton of crude steel produced
Calculate industry-wide averages for environmental, social, and governance metrics
